chapter_title.en: What Allah (azwj) has Forbidden a Believer to do Against a Fellow Believer

text: 177 - وعن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام أنه قال: أبى الله أن يظن بالمؤمن إلا خيرا، وكسر عظم المؤمن ميتا ككسره حيا.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 177. It has been reported that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said: It is Allah's will that a believer should always be thought of well; and to humiliate a dead believer is like humiliating him whilst alive.
